rulings.Case Title: HUMBERTO PANUCO VS. MARIA ANTONIA VALENCIA ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn For Attorney'S Fees And Costs
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 26, 2018 line 1. DEFENDANTs FERNANDA VALENCIA, CAROLINA VALENCIA, MARIA VALENCIA, and AUGUSTINE PELAYO's Motion For Attorney'S Fees And Costs Hearing Required to address admissibility of the Lease Agreement via deposition taken in a different action. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: DEWOLF REALTY CO., INC. ET AL VS. NANCY PUGLISI ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion, Motion, Memorandum Of Points And Authorities Adn Declaration In Support Of Motion To Vacate Default And Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 26, 2018 line 2. DEFENDANT NANCY PUGLISI's Motion To Vacate Default And Judgment GRANTED subject to (1) opposition; (2) Defendant presenting no later than 9:00 a.m. on December 24, 2018 medical evidence showing dates of chemo treatment and recovery; and (3) filing an answer and posting $14,851.88 with the Court no later than January 2, 2018. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: GHASITA S. SANDHU VS. ROMEO BAFUL ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 26, 2018 line 3. PLAINTIFF GHASITA SANDHU's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT GRANTED, subject to opposition. Plaintiff to prepare order in compliance with CCP 437c(g). = (501/CFH)
